author: lOrm
content: FORBIDDEN: src/subagent.rs is on the locked file list for this bulk pass. run_subagent at line 936 unconditionally passing None for memory_db remains a real correctness bug (memory_* tools silently no-op for spawned agents). Mandated refactor (thread &MemoryDb through SubagentConfig and pass it to execute_tool_with_memory) stands for a subagent-focused worktree.
